source: O'Neill School of Public and Environmental Affairs at IU

news.title: O’Neill School researchers to shape future policy at MPSA Conference
news.summary_en: O’Neill School scholars will present research and lead sessions at the 83rd MPSA Conference, showcasing policy insights and emerging leaders in political science.

news.title: Simon appointed an editor of the Review of Economics and Statistics
news.summary_en: O’Neill School professor Kosali Simon is appointed editor of the Review of Economics and Statistics, helping guide top economic research and scholarly discourse.
